# Class DocFile

The DocFile class represents a document file in DOCUMENTS.

## Properties

### fieldName

`fieldName: string`

The technical name of the field.

**Since:** DOCUMENTS 5.0

## Methods

### setAttribute

`setAttribute(attribute: string, value: string): boolean`

Set the String value of an attribute of the DocFile.

**Parameters:**

- `attribute`: `string` ‚Äî Name of the attribute
- `value`: `string` ‚Äî Desired value

**Returns:** boolean
